meta.note: Tournament blind structures for Felt. Stacks are in chips; blinds rise per level and the engine advances by HANDS played (not a clock), so durations from a live structure are translated to a hands-per-level count. No antes, no top-up; rebuy amount is recorded for reference only (rebuy logic is out of scope).

structures.name: Pub game (sped up)
structures.source: Jason's live pub structure, break + top-up removed, intervals translated to hands and sped up.
